name: Federal Bank Wave RuPay Credit Card
milestoneBenefits: 1,000 bonus reward points on achieving quarterly spend of Rs 50,000
additionalBenefits: RuPay card enabled for UPI payments — link to any UPI app and pay via QR codes
10% cashback on first 5 UPI transactions within the first 30 days (capped at Rs 200)
additionalDetails: The Wave card is a floater RuPay card linked to your primary Federal Bank Visa or Mastercard credit card. It shares the same credit limit but generates a separate billing statement and requires separate payment.
Eligible only for existing Federal Bank Visa or Mastercard credit card holders. Not available if your primary card is already a RuPay variant.

salaried: Existing Federal Bank Visa or Mastercard credit card holder
Subject to Federal Bank credit guidelines
selfEmployed: Existing Federal Bank Visa or Mastercard credit card holder
Subject to Federal Bank credit guidelines

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
The Wave card is a floater/add-on RuPay credit card linked to an existing Federal Bank Visa or Mastercard credit card. It shares the credit limit but has a separate billing statement.
Base reward rate: 1 point per Rs 200 spent (0.5% earn rate).
Welcome offer: 10% cashback on first 5 UPI transactions within first 30 days, capped at Rs 200.
Milestone: 1,000 bonus reward points on quarterly spend of Rs 50,000.
